nasb.text: They cried out to the Lord and said, ‘We have sinned because we have forsaken the Lord and have served the Baals and the Ashtaroth; but now deliver us from the hands of our enemies, and we will serve You.’

esv.text: And they cried out to the Lord and said, ‘We have sinned, because we have forsaken the Lord  and have served the Baals and the Ashtaroth. But now deliver us out of the hand of our enemies, that we may serve you.’

cnv.text: 他們就哀求耶和華，說：‘我們犯了罪，因為我們背棄了耶和華，又去服事巴力和亞斯他錄。現在求你救我們脫離仇敵的手，我們就必事奉你。’

ccb.text: 他们就向耶和华呼求，‘耶和华啊，我们犯了罪，我们背弃了你去供奉巴力和亚斯她录，现在求你从仇敌手中救我们，我们必事奉你。’
